tagline: The Art of Swimming Pools and Spas

hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built One Family
at a Time
hero.subheadline: For 28 years, Accurate Pool & Spa has given Wisconsin families the backyard they always wanted. We focus on one project at a time so every pool gets the craftsmanship and personal attention it deserves — just tell us your vision and we will make it real.
checkmarks: One project at a time dedication

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">From Start to Finish
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to hot tub installation and ongoing service, we handle every detail so you can focus on enjoying your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Inground swimming pools designed and built to fit your property, lifestyle, and budget. Every pool is a one-of-a-kind creation tailored to your family.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Premium hot tubs and spas from trusted brands, professionally installed and serviced. Extend your backyard season with year-round relaxation.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Aging liner dragging down your pool's look? We replace liners quickly and precisely, restoring your pool to like-new condition.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems — we upgrade your pool equipment for better efficiency, lower costs, and easier maintenance.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform an outdated pool into a modern backyard retreat. New tile, coping, decking, and features that completely refresh your space.

cards.title: Water Features & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, fountains, outdoor kitchens, and living spaces that turn your backyard into the ultimate entertainment destination.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call Paul or fill out our form. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, discuss your budget, and give you an honest, no-pressure estimate — all at no cost.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Your project gets our full attention — we focus on one build at a time. From permitting to final plaster, our licensed crew handles every detail with 28 years of proven expertise.

steps.title: Dive In and Enjoy
steps.description: Your custom pool or spa is ready. We walk you through everything, answer every question, and stay available for ongoing service whenever you need us — weekends and evenings included.

about.label: Why Wisconsin Families Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, One Pool at a Time — That Is Our Promise
about.description: Since 1998, Paul and the Accurate Pool & Spa team have been building custom swimming pools and installing hot tubs across Southeastern Wisconsin. As a family-owned business, we treat every project like it is our own backyard. We focus on one build at a time because your pool deserves undivided attention — not a rushed crew juggling five jobs. Our business is built on referrals, and that is the way we like it.

features.title: One Project at a Time Focus
features.description: We never juggle multiple builds. Your pool gets our complete attention from the first dig to the final walkthrough.

features.title: 28 Years of Proven Experience
features.description: Since 1998, we have built hundreds of pools across Wisconsin. Our reputation is built on craftsmanship and customer referrals.

features.title: Financing Made Simple
features.description: We work with multiple lenders to help you find a payment plan that fits your budget. Your dream pool is more affordable than you think.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, transparent estimate. We walk you through every cost before work begins — no hidden fees, no change-order surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every spa we install. If something is not right, call Paul directly — we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. That is how a family business operates, and after 28 years, we would not have it any other way.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool builds take 6-10 weeks depending on complexity, weather, and permitting. Because we focus on one project at a time, your build stays on schedule without the delays that come from crews being spread across multiple sites.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We work with multiple lending partners to help you find financing that fits your budget. During your free consultation, we will discuss all available options so your dream pool is within reach.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Watertown, Lake Country, and all of Southeastern Wisconsin. If you are not sure whether you are in our service area, just give us a call — we are happy to discuss your project.

faqs.question: Can you remodel or upgrade my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From liner replacements and equipment upgrades to full remodels with new tile, coping, and water features — we can transform your existing pool into something brand new.

faqs.question: Do you sell and install hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we carry quality name-brand hot tubs and spas. We handle everything from helping you choose the right model to professional delivery, installation, and ongoing service.

testimonials.name: Leah W.
testimonials.text: Paul was wonderful in helping us out. He answered my millions of questions, made sure we had the supplies and preplanning we needed, and made himself available during weekends and evenings. We will be making the drive to Watertown for all of our pool needs!

testimonials.name: Chris B.
testimonials.text: Our pool looks great, and they made it happen before Memorial Day! The whole process was smooth and Paul kept us informed every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Trent N.
testimonials.text: Paul is always great to work with and he always fits us in his busy schedule. After years of service, we would not trust anyone else with our pool.

Ready to Build Your

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation with Paul. We will visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest estimate — no pressure, no surprises.
